<?php

/**
 * @file
 * Fixture: legacy drupal_render() usage that MUST be flagged.
 */

function my_module_preprocess_block(array &$variables): void {
  $build = ['#markup' => 'hi'];
  // drupal_render() was removed in Drupal 9; this is the antipattern.
  $variables['rendered'] = drupal_render($build);
}
